free_text: Analysis of states in 13C populated in 9Be+4He
Helium (4He) gas in which a single silicon detector
The pressure was adjusted so as to stop 9Be beam ~5 cm
Gas pressures were 460, 820, 955 and 1020 mbar for
Large area (5x5 cm2) detector (1 mm thick).
Calibrated by 12 and 16 MeV 7Li scattered by 197Au
Typical energy resolution of each strip was 100 keV
Corrected for variation of the angular acceptance of
the silicon detector as a function of the distance
of interaction point by Monte Carlo simulation
Parameters close to Tab.13.4 of Ajzenberg-Selove
Parameters close to Tab.13.8 of Ajzenberg-Selove
